title: lithocarpus sandakanensis
intro: Lithocarpus sandakanensis, also known as the Sandakan Lithocarpus, is a species of plant in the beech family, Fagaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lithocarpus sandakanensis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water, creating a tea that is consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
